mapper.sql: s.stock_code, s.stock_name, s.exchange, d.dict_name AS exchange_name, s.industry, ind.label AS industry_name, rq.current_price, rq.open_price, rq.high_price, rq.low_price, rq.trade_date, rq.update_time AS quote_update_time, ROUND((rq.current_price - rq.open_price) / rq.open_price * 100, 4) AS change_percent, agg.last_div_year AS latest_dividend_year, agg.total_cash_per_year AS latest_cash_per_share, agg.total_cash_per_year AS dividend_per_share, ROUND( IF(rq.current_price > 0 AND agg.total_cash_per_year > 0, (agg.total_cash_per_year / rq.current_price) * 100, NULL), 4 ) AS dynamic_yield, ROUND( IF(rq.current_price > 0 AND agg.total_cash_per_year > 0, (agg.total_cash_per_year / rq.current_price) * 100, NULL), 4 ) AS dividend_yield
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM stock_basic s LEFT JOIN sys_dict d ON s.exchange = d.dict_code AND d.dict_type = 'exchange_type' LEFT JOIN industry_sector ind ON s.industry = ind.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT r1.* FROM stock_realtime_quote r1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT stock_code, MAX(trade_date) AS max_date FROM stock_realtime_quote GROUP BY stock_code ) r2 ON r1.stock_code = r2.stock_code AND r1.trade_date = r2.max_date ) rq ON s.stock_code = rq.stock_code LEFT JOIN ( SELECT stock_code, MAX(year) AS last_div_year, SUM(cash_per_share) AS total_cash_per_year FROM stock_dividend WHERE status = 'IMPLEMENTED' AND year = YEAR(CURDATE()) - 1 GROUP BY stock_code ) agg ON s.stock_code = agg.stock_code
AND s.stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{stockCode}, '%')
AND s.stock_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{stockName}, '%')
AND s.exchange = #{exchange}
AND s.industry = #{industry}
AND (s.stock_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%') OR s.stock_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keywords}, '%'))
ORDER BY ISNULL(dynamic_yield) ASC, dynamic_yield DESC, s.stock_code ASC
